Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: cheap and inferior quality suit, short top hat
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, short black hair, brown eyes, thin build, average-looking features with a deep outline, scholarly air, wearing a linen shirt
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Claims to have lost recent memories (amnesia)
Klein Moretti.role: Civilian staff at Blackthorn Security Company
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Described wearing a short top hat and a cheap suit.

Ince Zangwill.primary_clothing: all-black clergyman robe with buttons on both sides and a soft cap
Ince Zangwill.face_description: facial features like a classic sculpture without any wrinkles, high nose, tightly pursed lips
Ince Zangwill.visual_anchor: 40-year-old male, dark blonde hair, deep blue eyes, blind in one eye, high nose, wearing an all-black clergyman robe with buttons on both sides and a soft cap
Ince Zangwill.accessories: Sealed Artifact 0-08 (a quill that does not need ink to write)
Ince Zangwill.source_notes: Explicitly described from a wanted poster/photo in the text.

Dunn Smith.face_description: A mature face with a slightly high hairline and deep, abstruse gray eyes. His expression is often calm, sometimes featuring a polite but unusual smile.
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: late 30s male, fair skin, short dark brown hair with a high receding hairline, deep gray eyes, wearing a black top hat and a knee-length black trench coat, holding a tobacco pipe
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: Enjoys smoking tobacco mixed with mint leaves
Dunn Smith.accessories: pipe, gorgeous golden pocket watch on a golden chain
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Klein observes he looks to be in his thirties.

Mrs. Orianna.face_description: Refined and elegant face, clear and smiling eyes.
Mrs. Orianna.visual_anchor: 30s female, fair skin, black fashionable curly hair, clear green eyes, wearing a flounce lace dress.
Mrs. Orianna.source_notes: Appearance explicitly described in the chapter text when Klein meets her in the finance office.

Rozanne.primary_clothing: light green Loen-styled dress with beautiful laces on sleeves, collar, and chest
Rozanne.face_description: Bright forehead and light-brown eyes, often seen with a sweet and friendly smile.
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Introduction in Chapter 17; description of her dress, hair, and eyes provided.

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: working class Victorian attire, simple worn suit
Benson Moretti.face_description: ordinary face with signs of fatigue from working hard to support his family
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Described as Klein's older brother who works at an import and export company. Visuals are guessed based on setting and relation to Klein.

King George III.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, fair skin, regal authoritative face, wearing royal attire and a crown
King George III.color_palette: gold, royal blue, crimson red, white
King George III.source_notes: Described on the money note as having two mustaches.

Henry Augustus I.primary_clothing: royal attire with a white hair band
Henry Augustus I.face_description: Rotund face with slender eyes and an abnormally serious expression.
Henry Augustus I.visual_anchor: adult male, rotund face, slender eyes, abnormally serious expression, wearing a white hair band.
Henry Augustus I.source_notes: Described from his portrait on the five-pound note.

William Augustus VI.face_description: Firm gaze with a thick mustache.
William Augustus VI.visual_anchor: adult male, thick mustache, firm gaze.
William Augustus VI.source_notes: Described from his portrait on the one-pound note.

Bloody Butcher.visual_anchor: shadowy male figure in dark clothing.
Bloody Butcher.source_notes: Mentioned as a serial killer and Beyonder from 16 years ago. Appearance is guessed based on context.

Old Neil.face_description: wrinkles at the edge of his eyes and mouth were deeply recessed
Old Neil.visual_anchor: elderly male, frail build, thinning white hair, wrinkled pale face, wearing worn Victorian clothing, surrounded by documents
Old Neil.source_notes: Explicitly described when Klein meets him in his office.

Roselle Gustav.face_description: handsome and charismatic face with an air of authority
Roselle Gustav.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, elaborate emperor attire, charismatic and authoritative presence
Roselle Gustav.color_palette: imperial red, gold, white, navy blue
Roselle Gustav.source_notes: Historical figure mentioned, visual features guessed based on his status as Emperor/Consul.

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: Died by repeatedly hitting his head against a wall
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Police confirmed his death by apparent suicide in his house.
